general.name: Enable FileVault
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>19474FB9-3441-4B6A-A1DC-C3BCF5D0BB83</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>19474FB9-3441-4B6A-A1DC-C3BCF5D0BB83</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Enable FileVault </string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>515851b2-9b26-4739-9801-0675a7584316</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>9C6E5CA3-F768-49AC-BAD9-30B52314C144</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>JSS FileVault Recovery Key Escrow Certificate</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>FileVault2Comm.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><false/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><true/></dict><dict><key>Defer</key><true/><key>DeferDontAskAtUserLogout</key><true/><key>DeferForceAtUserLoginMaxBypassAttempts</key><integer>0</integer><key>Enable</key><string>On</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>FileVault</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6E6D3931-2755-4FFD-A8A6-A41AB04498E2</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX.FileVault2</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6E6D3931-2755-4FFD-A8A6-A41AB04498E2</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>ShowRecoveryKey</key><false/><key>UseRecoveryKey</key><true/></dict><dict><key>EncryptCertPayloadUUID</key><string>515851b2-9b26-4739-9801-0675a7584316</string><key>Location</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>FileVault Recovery Key Escrow</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>B700B18B-ACBD-43CB-9233-F133D05983FA</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.FDERecoveryKeyEscrow</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>B700B18B-ACBD-43CB-9233-F133D05983FA</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer></dict><dict><key>DestroyFVKeyOnStandby</key><true/><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>78089FE8-AFD5-4C11-8F17-030F1924C030</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>78089FE8-AFD5-4C11-8F17-030F1924C030</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>dontAllowFDEDisable</key><true/></dict></array></dict></plist>

computer_group.name: Saks Global Prestage Remote Devices - All
